owl:Ontology.rdfs:label: Formal Enterprise Ontology
owl:Ontology.rdfs:comment: Ontology derived from Formal Concept Analysis of Enterprise Ontology
owl:Ontology.dc:title: Formal Enterprise Ontology
owl:Ontology.dc:description: This ontology represents a Formal Concept Analysis (FCA) of Enterprise Ontology. Class names use terms from the formal context, while attributes define class intensions.

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: assigned to an Object
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is assigned to an Object
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: assigned to an Object

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: can be recognised
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this can be recognised
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: can be recognised

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: predicate

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: unary predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a unary predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: unary predicate

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: binary predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a binary predicate
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: binary predicate

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: assigned to two Objects
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is assigned to two Objects
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: assigned to two Objects

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: set of Features of a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a set of Features of a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: set of Features of a Thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: persistent
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is persistent
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: persistent

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: identity
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is an unique identity
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: identity

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: bare
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is bare
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: bare

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: Object of a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is an identity of a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: Object of a Thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: Object of No thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this does not represent any thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: Object of No thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: Object of Concrete thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is an identity of a Concrete thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: Object of Concrete thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: Object of Abstract thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is an identity of an Abstract thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: Object of Abstract thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: Object of conceptual thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is an identity of a Conceptual thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: Object of Conceptual thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: in a mind
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is in a mind
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: in a mind

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: can represent a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this can represent a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: can represent a Thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: in reality
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is in reality
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: in reality

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: collection of Things
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a collection of Things
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: collection of Things

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: single Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is a single Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: single Thing

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: distinguishable
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is distinguishable
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: distinguishable

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: with Object
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is with an Object
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: with Object

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: with assigned Features
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is with assigned Features
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: with assigned Features

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: physical dimensions
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this has physical dimensions
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: physical dimensions

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: conceived
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this is conceived
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: conceived

owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:label: cannot represent a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.rdfs:comment: Indicates whether this cannot represent a Thing
owl:DatatypeProperty.dc:description: Attribute from formal context: cannot represent a Thing

owl:Class.rdfs:label: Feature
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Feature: a recognisable predicate that is assigned to an Object or a pair of Objects
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {assigned to an Object, can be recognised, predicate}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: UnaryFeature
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Unary feature: a Feature that is a unary predicate
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {assigned to an Object, can be recognised, predicate, unary predicate}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: BinaryFeature
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Binary feature: a Feature that is a binary predicate
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {can be recognised, predicate, binary predicate, assigned to two Objects}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: Form
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Form: a non-empty set of Features that are assigned to an Object
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {set of Features of a Thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: Object
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Object: a persistent, bare identity
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, bare}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: AdornedObject
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Adorned object: an Object of a Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, Object of a Thing, bare}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ConcreteObject
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Concrete object: an Adorned object of a Concrete thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, Object of a Thing, bare, Object of Concrete thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ConceptualObject
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Conceptual object: an Adorned object of a Conceptual thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, Object of a Thing, bare, Object of a Conceptual thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: AbstractObject
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Abstract object: an Adorned object of an Abstract thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, Object of a Thing, bare, Object of an Abstract thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: UnadornedObject
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Unadorned object: an Object of No thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {persistent, identity, bare, Object of no thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: Thing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Thing: a relationship between an Object and assigned Features which makes it distinguishable
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: NoeticThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Noetic thing: a Thing in a mind
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ConceptualThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Conceptual thing: a Noetic thing that can represent another Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, can represent a Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: AbstractThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Abstract thing: a Noetic thing that cannot represent another Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, cannot represent a Thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental thing: a Thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalNoeticThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental noetic thing: a Noetic thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalConceptualThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental conceptual thing: a Conceptual thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, can represent a Thing, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalAbstractThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental abstract thing: an Abstract thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, cannot represent a Thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite thing: a Thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeNoeticThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite noetic thing: a Noetic thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeConceptualThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite conceptual thing: a Conceptual thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, can represent a Thing, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeAbstractThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite abstract thing: an Abstract thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in a mind, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, cannot represent a Thing}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Concrete thing: a Thing that is in reality
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: TangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Tangible concrete thing: a Concrete thing with physical dimensions
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, physical dimensions}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: IntangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Intangible concrete thing: a Concrete thing that is conceived
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, conceived}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental concrete thing: a Concrete thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalTangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental tangible concrete thing: a Tangible concrete thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, physical dimensions}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: ElementalIntangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Elemental intangible concrete thing: an Intangible concrete thing that is a single Thing
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, single Thing, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, conceived}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite concrete thing: a Concrete thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeTangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite tangible concrete thing: a Tangible concrete thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, physical dimensions}

owl:Class.rdfs:label: CompositeIntangibleConcreteThing
owl:Class.rdfs:comment: Composite intangible concrete thing: an Intangible concrete thing that is a collection of Things
owl:Class.dc:description: Derived concept from FCA with intension: {in reality, collection of Things, distinguishable, with Object, with assigned Features, conceived}

owl:NamedIndividual.rdfs:label: birthday of [x] is [y] assigned to Charlie Chaplin and day 2411108
{waterdrops assigned to a cloud, crystals assigned to a cloud}
